---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for improving the federated learning framework
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: ['enhancement', 'needs-discussion']
assignees: ''

---

## Feature Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see added.

## Motivation
**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

**Use Case**
Describe the specific use case this feature would address in the context of federated learning for ADNI classification.

## Proposed Solution
**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Implementation Details
If you have ideas about implementation:

### FL Strategy Impact
- [ ] Affects FedAvg implementation
- [ ] Affects FedProx implementation
- [ ] Affects SecAgg/SecAggPlus implementation
- [ ] New aggregation strategy
- [ ] Client-side changes
- [ ] Server-side changes

### Component Impact
- [ ] Model architectures (`adni_classification/models/`)
- [ ] Dataset handling (`adni_classification/datasets/`)
- [ ] Configuration system (`configs/`)
- [ ] Training scripts (`scripts/`)
- [ ] Utilities (`adni_classification/utils/`)
- [ ] FL implementation (`adni_flwr/`)

### Technical Considerations
- Performance implications?
- Memory/compute requirements?
- Compatibility with existing configurations?
- Impact on privacy/security?

## Alternative Solutions
**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Research Context
- [ ] This relates to improving classification accuracy
- [ ] This relates to enhancing privacy preservation
- [ ] This relates to scalability improvements
- [ ] This relates to new evaluation metrics
- [ ] This relates to data preprocessing
- [ ] This relates to model interpretability

## References
- Link to relevant papers, issues, or external resources
- Related work or similar implementations

## Acceptance Criteria
What would make this feature complete?
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.
